block1.comment: bit28_md1acca79 HW=59 W-witness from F101 corpus (lowest of 18633 records). Built 2026-04-28 (F148) for yale's block2 absorber search. Cand IS structurally distinguished (de58_size=2048, hardlock_bits=15) — predicted lower absorber score floor than bit3 generic. Per F143 + F146 coordination.

chain_state_input.comment: Block-1 produces non-zero working-state residual (HW=59) with d=h=0 cascade-1 forced. Block-2 starts with this state.

target_diff_at_round_N.comment: All-zero collision target. Naive: block-2 with no W2 constraints. Used as F110/F111 absorber search baseline.
